messages.text: Verdant growth twines over your wounds, drawing on the wild to mend you over time.
Verdant growth twines over {name}'s wounds, blooming with healing life.
The wild growth blooms anew, knitting a little more of your hurt closed.
The wild growth withers and falls away, its healing spent.
The wild growth twining over {name} withers and falls away.
{name} is wrapped in blooming, verdant growth that slowly mends their wounds.
